creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
After update to 8.2_2 build fails when default python version is 3.x.

For detail see following build logs.

https://www.utahime.org/FreeBSD/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/112amd64-local-python3/2018-12-12_00h29m04s/logs/errors/gdb-8.2_2.log
